name: Affinity Photo
description: Professional photo editing and raster graphics application

extraction.notes: Serif uses Sparkle with custom feeds on s3.amazonaws.com. The /retail/ path is for direct purchases; Mac App Store version uses separate feed at /mas/ path.

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase). Serif uses V2 product line; V1 feeds may differ. The appcast URL pattern is /mac/retail/<product>/appcast.xml on s3.amazonaws.com. Mac App Store version uses /mac/mas/<product>/appcast.xml. Also available on Mac App Store.
